steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content: The clause beginning with “While the greater adjutant (*Leptoptilos dubius*) can be found in places like the Inner Gulf of Thailand and Manchar Lake in Pakistan” is a dependent clause (starts with “While”). The clause beginning “more than 80 percent of this endangered stork species is found” is an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
A comma separates an introductory dependent clause from the independent clause that follows. “Pakistan, more” provides this required punctuation.

The remaining choices violate this rule by using a semicolon, period, and no punctuation respectively.

That confirms A is correct.
